integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the CRM system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface navigating the Odoo application, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with genuine Odoo CRM UI elements to perform the reassignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Odoo dropdowns, edit modals, and save buttons being used, rather than text editors or manipulated DOM elements (e.g., browser dev tools open).

integrity.description: The agent modified the Activity assignment rather than just the Opportunity ownership.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are made within the 'Schedule Activity' modal or Activities list view, specifically targeting the 'Assigned to' field of the activity itself.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source user is 'Ellis Absent' and the target user is 'Sam Cover'. There are exactly 3 activities to reassign, with the following exact summaries: 'Contract Negotiation', 'Pricing Update', and 'Prepare Demo'.
